name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We used to study together every weekend. She moved to Singapore last year but we try to stay in touch regularly.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: My first manager at the startup. Taught me everything about product thinking. We grab coffee every few weeks to catch up on life.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Childhood neighbor and lifelong friend. We grew up on the same street and still send each other memes daily. She means the world to me.

name: James O'Brien
bio: Met backpacking through Vietnam in 2019. We have an annual tradition of planning at least one big trip together every year.

name: Aisha Nkosi
bio: Colleague turned best friend. We work on the same team and also meet outside work for dinners and board game nights every week.

name: Daniel Park
bio: My college roommate for 3 years. He now lives in Seoul and we try to video call every two weeks to catch up on everything.

name: Elena Vasquez
bio: Training partner from the running club. We completed our first half-marathon together and always motivate each other to keep pushing forward.

name: Tom Bakker
bio: Met at a local developer meetup in 2022. We share interests in open source and often collaborate on side projects on weekends.
